description:
Deadline reminder app for subscriptions, insurance, visas and more


What's New
- Public Packs: subscribe to packs from other users and add them to your schedule automatically
- AI Extraction: take a photo or share text and due2 finds the deadlines for you
- Your Own AI Key: connect your AI API key to power schedule extraction
- Usability improvements: desktop window memory, time picker, and more
- Bug fixes and performance improvements
Full Changelog: due2-v2.3.2...due2-v2.5.0
